steps.name: I open the Goibibo website

elements.name: Book a one way outstation cab from Delhi Cantt to Manali and select SUV

steps.name: I navigate to the Cabs section
I select "Outstation One-way" trip type
I enter "Delhi Cantt" in the From location
I select "Delhi Cantt Railway Junction" from the suggestions
I enter "Manali" in the To location
I select "Manali, Himachal Pradesh" from the suggestions
I set pickup date to "10/06/2026"
I set pickup time to "10:30 AM"
I click the Search button for cabs
I close any popups on the cab listing page
I select the SUV cab type from filters
the cab results should be displayed with SUV type
I open the Goibibo website

elements.name: Search for hotels in Manali Mall Road with 4 adults

steps.name: I navigate to the Hotels section

steps.name: I enter "Manali Mall Road" in hotel search
I select "Mall Road, Manali" from hotel suggestions
I set hotel check-in date to "11/06/2026"
I set hotel check-out date to "15/06/2026"
I set number of adults to 4
I click Search for hotels
the hotel results page should be displayed
I open the Goibibo website
